message:
Running command: 
echo "=== POST-DRT $(date) ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID" && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime=,%cpu= 2>/dev/null || echo "OpenROAD EXITED"

echo ""
echo "=== Latest log ==="
echo "librelane_drt3.log: $(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_drt3.log) bytes"
grep -v "^$" /tmp/librelane_drt3.log | grep -E "(violations|Complete detail|check_ant|repair_ant|write|Skipping|diodes|drt-run)" | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Step 72 contents ==="
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/"
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-0/" 2>/dev/null | head -5
ls -lh "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/drt-run-1/" 2>/dev/null | head -5

echo ""
echo "=== All processes ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic|netgen)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%"}'

echo ""
echo "=== New steps? ==="
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8

function.name: execute_bash
